com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl

Class PlatformHtmlDataSerializer

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl.PlatformHtmlDataSerializer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DataSerializer

    public class PlatformHtmlDataSerializer
extends java.lang.Object
implements DataSerializer

    transform PlatformData to HTML type defined in nexacro platform and output withOutputStream or Writer.

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PlatformHtmlDataSerializer()
      basic creator.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void setProperty(java.lang.String key, java.lang.Object value)
      Set property value.
      protected void write(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, java.lang.String charset)
      Output PlatformData as HTML type.
      protected void write(java.io.Writer out, java.lang.String str, int depth)
      Output character string.
      protected void writeColumnHeader(java.io.Writer out, int index, DataSet ds, ColumnHeader header, int depth)
      Output DataSet ColumnHeader as HTML type.
      protected void writeColumns(java.io.Writer out, DataSet ds, int depth)
      Output DataSet columns as HTML type.
      void writeData(java.io.OutputStream out, PlatformData data, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, java.lang.String charset)
      Transform PlatformData to HTML type and output with OutputStream.
      void writeData(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, java.lang.String charset)
      Transform PlatformData to HTML type and output with Writer.
      protected void writeDataSet(java.io.Writer out, int index, DataSet ds, int depth)
      Output DataSet as HTML type.
      protected void writeDataSetList(java.io.Writer out, DataSetList dsList, int depth)
      Output DataSetList as HTML type.
      protected void writeDate(java.io.Writer out, int depth)
      Output current date.
      protected void writeFooter(java.io.Writer out, java.lang.String charset, int depth)
      Output HTML tag closure.
      protected void writeHeader(java.io.Writer out, java.lang.String charset, int depth)
      Output HTML tag start.
      protected void writeHtmlBody(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, java.lang.String charset, int depth)
      Output HTML document Body region.
      protected void writeHtmlHead(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, java.lang.String charset, int depth)
      Output HTML document Head region.
      protected void writeJavaScript(java.io.Writer out, int depth)
      Output HTML Head JavaScript region.
      protected void writeLine(java.io.Writer out, int depth)
      Output line.
      protected void writeMeta(java.io.Writer out, java.lang.String charset, int depth)
      Output HTML Head Meta tag.
      protected void writeRow(java.io.Writer out, int index, DataSet ds, int row, int depth)
      Output DataSet row as HTML type.
      protected void writeRows(java.io.Writer out, DataSet ds, int depth)
      Output DataSet rows as HTML type.
      protected void writeStyle(java.io.Writer out, int depth)
      Output HTML Head Style region.
      protected void writeTitle(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, int depth)
      Output HTML Head Title tag.
      protected void writeVariable(java.io.Writer out, int index, Variable var, int depth)
      Output Variable as HTML type.
      protected void writeVariableList(java.io.Writer out, VariableList varList, int depth)
      Output VariableList as HTML type.

      • writeData

                      PlatformData data,
                      DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                      java.lang.String charset)
               throws PlatformException
        Transform PlatformData to HTML type and output with OutputStream.

        writeData in interface DataSerializer
        Parameters:
        out - OutputStream
        data - PlatformData
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        charset - character set

      • writeData

        public void writeData(java.io.Writer out,
                      PlatformData data,
                      DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                      java.lang.String charset)
               throws PlatformException
        Transform PlatformData to HTML type and output with Writer.
        Specified by:
        writeData in interface DataSerializer
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        data - PlatformData
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        charset - character set

      • write

        protected void write(java.io.Writer out,
                     PlatformData data,
                     java.lang.String charset)
              throws java.io.IOException
        Output PlatformData as HTML type. Internally summoned method order is as below.
        Order Method Detail
        1 writeHeader(Writer, String, int) Output HTML tag start
        2 writeHtmlHead(Writer, PlatformData, String, int) Output HTML document Head region
        3 writeHtmlBody(Writer, PlatformData, String, int) Output HTML document Body region
        4 writeFooter(Writer, String, int) Output HTML tag closure
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        data - PlatformData
        charset - character set
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • writeHeader

        protected void writeHeader(java.io.Writer out,
                           java.lang.String charset,
                           int depth)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Output HTML tag start.
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        charset - character set
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • writeFooter

        protected void writeFooter(java.io.Writer out,
                           java.lang.String charset,
                           int depth)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Output HTML tag closure.
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        charset - character set
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • writeHtmlHead

        protected void writeHtmlHead(java.io.Writer out,
                             PlatformData data,
                             java.lang.String charset,
                             int depth)
                      throws java.io.IOException
        Output HTML document Head region.

        Internally summoned method order is as below.

        Order Method Detail
        1 write(Writer, String, int) HTML Head tag start output
        2 writeMeta(Writer, String, int) HTML Head Meta tag output
        3 writeTitle(Writer, PlatformData, int) HTML Head Title tag output
        4 writeStyle(Writer, int) HTML Head Style region output
        5 writeJavaScript(Writer, int) HTML Head JavaScript region output
        6 write(Writer, String, int) HTML Head tag closure output
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        data - PlatformData
        charset - character set
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • writeMeta

        protected void writeMeta(java.io.Writer out,
                         java.lang.String charset,
                         int depth)
                  throws java.io.IOException

        charset - character set
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • writeHtmlBody

        protected void writeHtmlBody(java.io.Writer out,
                             PlatformData data,
                             java.lang.String charset,
                             int depth)
                      throws java.io.IOException
        Output HTML document Body region.

        Internally summoned method order is as below.

        Order Method Detail
        1 write(Writer, String, int) HTML Body tag start output
        2 writeDate(Writer, int) current date output
        3 writeLine(Writer, int) line output
        4 writeVariableList(Writer, VariableList, int) VariableList output
        5 writeLine(Writer, int) line output
        6 writeDataSetList(Writer, DataSetList, int) DataSetList output
        7 write(Writer, String, int) HTML Body tag closure output
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        data - PlatformData
        charset - character set
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

        protected void writeDataSet(java.io.Writer out,
                            int index,
                            DataSet ds,
                            int depth)
                     throws java.io.IOException
        Output DataSet as HTML type. Internally summoned method order is as below.
        Order Method Detail
        1 writeColumns(Writer, DataSet, int) columns output
        2 writeRows(Writer, DataSet, int) rows output
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        index - location
        ds - DataSet
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
